issues.description: Main ability structure incorrect. Should be a single Activated effect with Rest action as cost, followed by conditional power reduction on opponent's character. Current DSL only rests own card but missing the core effect: cost reduction on opponent's character.
Condition should check if Leader has {Minks} type, not if card exists on board. Should be LeaderHasType:Minks
Missing ForceDiscard action for opponent's character cost reduction. The Rest is a cost (not an action), and the actual effect is giving −3 cost to opponent's character.
